title: FilloaxLib
description: A kotlin library for utility and cross-loader features for Filloax's mods.
body:
This library is meant to be used inside Filloax's mods. Currently those mods directly include it, even if this might change later, so users do not need to download it.

Check out my structure and NPC mod [Ruins of Growsseth](https://modrinth.com/mod/ruins-of-growsseth)!

For developers: check the [GitHub Readme](https://github.com/filloax/filloaxlib).
